title: Remove 'View Formulas' UI

requirements.text: Remove the 'View Formulas' section from the UI by eliminating the 'View Formulas' action and ensuring the formulas dialog cannot be opened from the app.
acceptanceCriteria: The action bar no longer shows a button labeled "View Formulas".
The formulas dialog (titled "All Formulas") is not rendered or otherwise accessible through the UI.
All other calculator actions (Use Example, Reset, Copy Shareable Link, and Run Dev Check in development) continue to work as before.
The app compiles with no unused state/handlers/props related to the removed formulas UI.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui or any other immutable paths listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
Use English for any user-facing text.
nonGoals: Do not change any DCF calculation logic or validation rules.
Do not remove or refactor backend Motoko code as part of this change.
